title: Operation Crimson — Full Red Team Engagement
module_title: Module 19: Operation Crimson — Full Red Team Engagement
learning_objectives: Achieve strategic objectives (data theft, sabotage, espionage)
Produce professional red team engagement report
scenario: Scenario Pan-African Insurance Group (PAIG): 2,000 employees, 4 countries, on-prem AD, Azure cloud, customer web portal. Could a determined adversary steal policyholder data? 14 days. Subtasks Scoring Rubric Linked Recipes: RA02, RA09, RA15, RA25 ________________________________________________________________________________

scenario_context.setting: Windhoek, Namibia, African digital commerce platform
scenario_context.challenge: Execute coordinated 14-day breach simulation for African digital commerce platform in Windhoek, Namibia
scenario_context.relevance: Reflects real-world African enterprise security challenges and red team operations across the continent

subtasks.title: Threat Model & Op Plan
subtasks.description: Complete threat model, operational plan, ROE.
subtasks.evidence: Threat model + op plan + ROE (12+ pages)
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Begin by thoroughly reviewing the scenario and understanding all objectives. Document your approach before execution. This is the foundational subtask that enables all following work.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed
subtasks.evidence_required: Threat model + op plan + ROE (12+ pages)

subtasks.title: Recon & Initial Access
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Conduct systematic reconnaissance and information gathering. Map the target network, identify services, and document all findings with evidence.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution

- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed

subtasks.title: C2 & Post-Exploitation
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Analyze vulnerabilities discovered in reconnaissance. Validate each vulnerability through testing and document the exploitation path.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement

- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed

subtasks.title: Lateral Movement & Escalation
subtasks.evidence: Attack chain with evidence at each pivot
subtasks.detailed_guidance:

Specific to this mission:
